nodes.label: Second Life Commerce
nodes.summary: AI-powered returns and sustainable resale platform designed for the circular economy.

nodes.label: FastAPI Backend
nodes.summary: The core application backend built with Python 3.11 and FastAPI.

nodes.label: React Frontend
nodes.summary: The user interface built with React.js, Vite, and Tailwind CSS.

nodes.label: Google Gemini Flash API
nodes.summary: Multi-modal AI used for product condition grading, image assessment, and regret prediction.

nodes.label: Amazon Kiro
nodes.summary: AI code assistance tool used for autocomplete during development.

nodes.label: JSON Database
nodes.summary: Lightweight persistence system using products.json, sellers.json, and listings.json.

nodes.label: AI Agent Logic
nodes.summary: Backend module containing Gemini API wrappers and multi-modal AI logic.

nodes.label: Routing Engine
nodes.summary: Decision matrix that determines if a product should be resold, refurbished, donated, or recycled.

nodes.label: Green Points System
nodes.summary: Reward system that gives points to users for participating in sustainable actions.

nodes.label: Return Regret Predictor
nodes.summary: AI analysis tool that predicts buyer regret to reduce unnecessary returns.

nodes.label: CO2 Impact Display
nodes.summary: Metrics showing the environmental savings (CO2) from resale actions.

nodes.label: Damage Annotation Overlay
nodes.summary: HTML Canvas interface for highlighting detected damage regions on product photos.

nodes.label: Member A (Lead)
nodes.summary: Responsible for AI integration, architecture, and routing logic.

nodes.label: Member B (Backend)
nodes.summary: Responsible for FastAPI endpoints, mock DB, and Green Points logic.

nodes.label: Member C (Frontend)
nodes.summary: Responsible for React UI, dashboard, and canvas annotations.

nodes.label: Sample Product Images
nodes.summary: Set of images used to test the AI's product grading and quality assessment capabilities.
